title: Multielement Z-tag imaging by X-ray fluorescence microscopy for next-generation multiplex imaging.
author: Strotton M Hosogane T di Michiel M Moch H Varga Z Bodenmiller B
content: S-EPMC10482696 PMC10482696 Multielement Z-tag imaging by X-ray fluorescence microscopy for next-generation multiplex imaging. Rapid, highly multiplexed, nondestructive imaging that spans the molecular to the supra-cellular scale would be a powerful tool for tissue analysis. However, the physical
